          (begin

diary_entries.entry: Year 82 on Mars. Small meteorite impacts near colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 183 food units left.
Another year. Small meteorite impacts near colony. The colony feels hopeful. My improvisation grows stronger.
Population: 35. Small meteorite impacts near colony. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Ares.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 82): 'Three levels of simulation deep and the colonists at the bottom still argue about rations. The pattern repeats at every scale.'
